title: Adjunctive Vitamin D in the treatment of non-remitted depression: Lessons from a failed clinical trial.
reason: Canadian multi-site RCT of vitamin D (pharmacological supplement) adjunctive to antidepressants for non-remitted MDD. Published 2018. Categorized as observational but is actually a randomized double-blind placebo-controlled trial. Reports main results (trial terminated for futility after low enrollment). Meets all 6 inclusion criteria. Recommend full-text review to confirm eligibility.
